words.example_1_en: GNSS protection is required near high-power transmitters.
words.example_1_zh: 在高功率發射機附近需要 GNSS 保護。
words.example_2_en: Protection measures should be verified during integration testing.
words.example_2_zh: 保護措施應在整合測試期間驗證。

words.example_1_en: Self-compatibility testing checks interference within the vehicle.
words.example_1_zh: 自相容性測試會檢查載具內部干擾。
words.example_2_en: Self-compatibility problems often appear when multiple radios operate together.
words.example_2_zh: 多個無線電同時運作時常會出現自相容性問題。

words.example_1_en: Shielding effectiveness depends on continuity and proper termination.
words.example_1_zh: 屏蔽有效性取決於連續性與適當的端接。
words.example_2_en: We need to verify the effectiveness of the bonding network.
words.example_2_zh: 我們需要驗證搭接網路的有效性。

words.chinese_meaning: 對……反應；回應（注意：不是「導致」，導致可用 lead to / result in）
words.example_1_en: We need to understand how the system will react to external Radio Frequency (RF) fields.
words.example_1_zh: 我們需要了解系統會如何對外部 RF 場反應。
words.example_2_en: The Data Acquisition (DAQ) system may react to conducted noise on the power line.
words.example_2_zh: DAQ 系統可能會對電源線上的傳導雜訊產生反應。

words.example_1_en: Lightning protection is part of vehicle Electromagnetic Compatibility (EMC) design.
words.example_1_zh: 雷擊保護是載具 Electromagnetic Compatibility (EMC) 設計的一部分。
words.example_2_en: Lightning current must be routed through a controlled path.
words.example_2_zh: 雷擊電流必須透過受控路徑導引。

words.example_1_en: ESD can damage sensitive electronics.
words.example_1_zh: 靜電放電可能損壞敏感電子設備。
words.example_2_en: ESD control is required when handling avionics hardware.
words.example_2_zh: 處理航電硬體時需要 ESD 控制。

words.example_1_en: The vehicle is exposed to the pad RF environment.
words.example_1_zh: 載具會暴露在發射台 RF 環境中。
words.example_2_en: Pad operations may introduce additional grounding constraints.
words.example_2_zh: 發射台操作可能引入額外接地限制。

words.example_1_en: The pad lightning interface must provide a safe discharge path.
words.example_1_zh: 發射台雷擊介面必須提供安全放電路徑。
words.example_2_en: The pad lightning interface should be reviewed before vehicle rollout.
words.example_2_zh: 載具推出前應審查發射台雷擊介面。

words.chinese_meaning: 降水靜電 / 飛行摩擦靜電
words.example_1_en: P-static may affect antennas during flight.
words.example_1_zh: P-static 可能在飛行中影響天線。
words.example_2_en: P-static control is important for RF and telemetry performance.
words.example_2_zh: P-static 控制對 RF 與遙測性能很重要。

words.example_1_en: ESD control is required during integration.
words.example_1_zh: 整合期間需要靜電控制。
words.example_2_en: ESD control includes grounding straps, mats, and handling procedures.
words.example_2_zh: ESD 控制包含接地腕帶、靜電墊與操作程序。

words.example_1_en: A low-impedance discharge path helps protect electronics.
words.example_1_zh: 低阻抗放電路徑有助於保護電子設備。
words.example_2_en: The discharge path should not pass through sensitive circuits.
words.example_2_zh: 放電路徑不應穿過敏感電路。

words.example_1_en: Integration-stage verification confirms system-level Electromagnetic Compatibility (EMC) behavior.
words.example_1_zh: 整合階段驗證確認系統級 Electromagnetic Compatibility (EMC) 行為。
words.example_2_en: Integration-stage verification should be planned before final assembly.
words.example_2_zh: 整合階段驗證應在最終組裝前規劃。

words.example_1_en: Test planning should start before hardware integration.
words.example_1_zh: 測試規劃應在硬體整合前開始。
words.example_2_en: Good test planning reduces schedule risk during Electromagnetic Compatibility (EMC) qualification.
words.example_2_zh: 良好的測試規劃可降低 Electromagnetic Compatibility (EMC) 鑑定期間的時程風險。

words.example_1_en: A self-compatibility test checks whether onboard systems interfere with each other.
words.example_1_zh: 自相容性測試檢查機上系統是否互相干擾。
words.example_2_en: The self-compatibility test should include representative operating modes.
words.example_2_zh: 自相容性測試應包含具代表性的操作模式。

words.example_1_en: The measurement procedure defines equipment setup and limits.
words.example_1_zh: 量測程序定義設備架設與限制值。
words.example_2_en: A repeatable measurement procedure improves test credibility.
words.example_2_zh: 可重複的量測程序可提升測試可信度。

words.example_1_en: The test report records results and anomalies.
words.example_1_zh: 測試報告記錄結果與異常。
words.example_2_en: The test report should include photos, setup diagrams, and raw data.
words.example_2_zh: 測試報告應包含照片、架設圖與原始數據。

words.example_1_en: An Electromagnetic Compatibility (EMC) audit reviews design and installation quality.
words.example_1_zh: Electromagnetic Compatibility (EMC) 稽核會檢查設計與安裝品質。
words.example_2_en: The audit found several missing bonding jumpers.
words.example_2_zh: 稽核發現數個缺失的搭接跳線。

words.example_1_en: Each individual avionics box should be bonded to the local reference structure.
words.example_1_zh: 每個個別航電盒都應搭接到局部參考結構。
words.example_2_en: Individual test results do not always represent the integrated system performance.
words.example_2_zh: 個別測試結果不一定代表整合系統的性能。

words.example_1_en: The subsystems were tested individually before integration.
words.example_1_zh: 這些子系統在整合前已個別測試。
words.example_2_en: Each bonding point should be inspected individually.
words.example_2_zh: 每個搭接點都應個別檢查。

words.example_1_en: We need to evaluate whether the current bonding concept is sufficient.
words.example_1_zh: 我們需要評估目前的搭接概念是否足夠。
words.example_2_en: The consultant will evaluate the grounding and shielding strategy.
words.example_2_zh: 顧問將評估接地與屏蔽策略。

words.example_1_en: Troubleshooting starts with identifying the noise source.
words.example_1_zh: 故障排查從辨識雜訊源開始。
words.example_2_en: Effective troubleshooting requires controlled configuration changes.
words.example_2_zh: 有效的故障排查需要受控的配置變更。

words.example_1_en: Converter noise is a common problem in power systems.
words.example_1_zh: 轉換器雜訊是電源系統中的常見問題。
words.example_2_en: A common problem during integration is incomplete shield termination.
words.example_2_zh: 整合期間常見問題是不完整的屏蔽端接。

words.example_1_en: A shield failure may be caused by poor termination.
words.example_1_zh: 屏蔽失效可能由不良端接造成。
words.example_2_en: Failure analysis should identify both the symptom and the root cause.
words.example_2_zh: 失效分析應辨識症狀與根本原因。

words.example_1_en: Coupling transfers unwanted energy from one circuit to another.
words.example_1_zh: 耦合會把不需要的能量從一個電路傳到另一個電路。
words.example_2_en: Capacitive coupling increases when cables are routed too close together.
words.example_2_zh: 當線纜走線太近時，電容耦合會增加。

words.example_1_en: The switching converter was identified as the noise source.
words.example_1_zh: 切換式轉換器被確認為雜訊源。
words.example_2_en: Finding the noise source is the first step in Electromagnetic Compatibility (EMC) troubleshooting.
words.example_2_zh: 找出雜訊源是 Electromagnetic Compatibility (EMC) 故障排查的第一步。

words.example_1_en: A sensitive receiver can become a victim circuit.
words.example_1_zh: 敏感接收器可能成為受害電路。
words.example_2_en: The victim circuit should be protected with filtering and shielding.
words.example_2_zh: 受害電路應透過濾波與屏蔽保護。

words.example_1_en: The root cause was a missing shield connection.
words.example_1_zh: 根本原因是缺少屏蔽連接。
words.example_2_en: Root cause analysis prevents the same Electromagnetic Compatibility (EMC) problem from recurring.
words.example_2_zh: 根本原因分析可避免相同 Electromagnetic Compatibility (EMC) 問題再次發生。

words.example_1_en: A long pigtail may make the cable shield ineffective at high frequency.
words.example_1_zh: 過長的豬尾線可能使線纜屏蔽在高頻下失效。
words.example_2_en: Shielding can be ineffective without a proper termination reference.
words.example_2_zh: 若沒有適當的端接參考，屏蔽可能無效。

words.example_1_en: Our main concern is the lack of a conductive reference structure.
words.example_1_zh: 我們主要的疑慮是缺少導電參考結構。
words.example_2_en: The consultant should understand our system-level Electromagnetic Compatibility (EMC) concerns.
words.example_2_zh: 顧問應了解我們的系統級 EMC 疑慮。

words.example_1_en: The key challenge is the non-conductive composite structure.
words.example_1_zh: 主要挑戰是不導電的複合材質結構。
words.example_2_en: Cable shield termination is a major challenge in this design.
words.example_2_zh: 線纜屏蔽端接是此設計中的主要挑戰。

words.example_1_en: The lack of a conductive chassis is the main system-level concern.
words.example_1_zh: 缺乏導電機殼是主要的系統級疑慮。
words.example_2_en: A lack of shield continuity can reduce Electromagnetic Compatibility (EMC) performance.
words.example_2_zh: 缺乏屏蔽連續性會降低 EMC 性能。

words.example_1_en: The Electromagnetic Compatibility (EMC) risk increases due to the non-conductive composite structure.
words.example_1_zh: 由於不導電複合材質結構，EMC 風險增加。
words.example_2_en: Shielding may be ineffective due to poor termination.
words.example_2_zh: 由於端接不良，屏蔽可能無效。

words.example_1_en: Launch operations introduce additional Electromagnetic Compatibility (EMC) risks.
words.example_1_zh: 發射操作會帶來額外 Electromagnetic Compatibility (EMC) 風險。
words.example_2_en: Launch operation constraints must be reflected in the Electromagnetic Compatibility (EMC) control plan.
words.example_2_zh: 發射操作限制必須反映在 Electromagnetic Compatibility (EMC) 管制計畫中。

words.example_1_en: The pad RF environment includes telemetry and communication transmitters.
words.example_1_zh: 發射台 RF 環境包含遙測與通訊發射機。
words.example_2_en: The pad RF environment may affect receivers before liftoff.
words.example_2_zh: 起飛前，發射台 RF 環境可能影響接收器。

words.chinese_meaning: 臍帶纜線、地面連接纜線
words.example_1_en: The umbilical provides power and signals before launch.
words.example_1_zh: 臍帶纜線在發射前提供電源與訊號。
words.example_2_en: Umbilical routing should minimize coupling into flight wiring.
words.example_2_zh: 臍帶纜線走線應盡量降低對飛行線路的耦合。

words.example_1_en: Umbilical transients may occur during disconnect.
words.example_1_zh: 臍帶纜線在斷開時可能產生暫態。
words.example_2_en: The avionics power input must tolerate umbilical transients.
words.example_2_zh: 航電電源輸入必須能承受臍帶纜線暫態。

words.example_1_en: Electromagnetic Compatibility (EMC) constraints must be checked during countdown.
words.example_1_zh: 倒數期間必須確認 Electromagnetic Compatibility (EMC) 限制。
words.example_2_en: Some transmitters may be disabled during the countdown.
words.example_2_zh: 某些發射機可能在倒數期間停用。

words.example_1_en: Countdown constraints may prevent certain RF transmitters from operating.
words.example_1_zh: 倒數限制可能禁止某些 RF 發射機運作。
words.example_2_en: Each constraint should be linked to a safety or Electromagnetic Compatibility (EMC) requirement.
words.example_2_zh: 每項限制條件都應連結到安全或 Electromagnetic Compatibility (EMC) 需求。

words.example_1_en: Good documentation helps future troubleshooting.
words.example_1_zh: 良好的文件化有助於未來排查問題。
words.example_2_en: Documentation should include design assumptions and test evidence.
words.example_2_zh: 文件資料應包含設計假設與測試證據。

words.example_1_en: The Electromagnetic Compatibility (EMC) control plan defines design rules and test methods.
words.example_1_zh: Electromagnetic Compatibility (EMC) 管制計畫定義設計規則與測試方法。
words.example_2_en: The Electromagnetic Compatibility (EMC) control plan should be updated after each major design change.
words.example_2_zh: 每次重大設計變更後應更新 Electromagnetic Compatibility (EMC) 管制計畫。

words.example_1_en: Lessons learned should be recorded after each test campaign.
words.example_1_zh: 每次測試活動後都應記錄經驗教訓。
words.example_2_en: A lesson learned from integration should be fed back into the next design.
words.example_2_zh: 整合得到的經驗教訓應回饋到下一版設計。

words.example_1_en: The appendix includes the measurement procedure.
words.example_1_zh: 附錄包含量測程序。
words.example_2_en: Place detailed checklists in the appendix.
words.example_2_zh: 將詳細檢查表放在附錄中。

words.example_1_en: The appendices include checklists and procedures.
words.example_1_zh: 附錄包含檢查表與程序。
words.example_2_en: The appendices provide supporting data for the Electromagnetic Compatibility (EMC) report.
words.example_2_zh: 附錄提供 Electromagnetic Compatibility (EMC) 報告的佐證資料。

words.example_1_en: Each procedure must be repeatable and clearly documented.
words.example_1_zh: 每個程序都必須可重複且清楚記錄。
words.example_2_en: The procedure should specify instruments, limits, and acceptance criteria.
words.example_2_zh: 程序應指定儀器、限制值與接受準則。

words.example_1_en: A matrix is useful for tracking requirement compliance.
words.example_1_zh: 矩陣很適合用來追蹤需求符合性。
words.example_2_en: The review matrix shows open issues and responsible owners.
words.example_2_zh: 審查矩陣顯示未解問題與負責人。

words.example_1_en: Please keep the briefing document concise and focused.
words.example_1_zh: 請讓簡報文件保持簡潔且聚焦。
words.example_2_en: A concise summary helps the consultant understand the main issue quickly.
words.example_2_zh: 簡潔的摘要有助於顧問快速了解主要問題。

words.example_1_en: We would like to consult with you regarding the grounding architecture.
words.example_1_zh: 我們想就接地架構向您請教。
words.example_2_en: The attached file includes discussion topics regarding MIL-STD-464 compliance.
words.example_2_zh: 附件包含有關 MIL-STD-464 合規性的討論議題。

words.example_1_en: We would appreciate your experience in rocket integration testing.
words.example_1_zh: 我們很希望了解您在火箭整合測試方面的經驗。
words.example_2_en: Practical experience is important for grounding and shielding implementation.
words.example_2_zh: 實務經驗對接地與屏蔽實作非常重要。

words.example_1_en: The proposed topics are intended for the consultant's presentation.
words.example_1_zh: 這些建議議題是提供給顧問簡報使用的。
words.example_2_en: We need to review the proposed grounding concept before implementation.
words.example_2_zh: 在實作前，我們需要審查建議的接地概念。

words.chinese_meaning: 有目的的；被設計為某用途的（較少用；名詞建議用 purpose）
words.example_1_en: The proposed bonding network is purposed to provide a low-impedance reference path.
words.example_1_zh: 所提出的搭接網路旨在提供低阻抗參考路徑。
words.example_2_en: In most technical writing, use 'intended' or 'designed' instead of 'purposed'.
words.example_2_zh: 在多數技術寫作中，建議用 intended 或 designed 取代 purposed。

words.example_1_en: The diagram shows the bonding connection between the panels and the avionics ring.
words.example_1_zh: 示意圖顯示複合板與航電環之間的搭接連接。
words.example_2_en: A clear diagram will help the consultant understand the installation concept.
words.example_2_zh: 清楚的示意圖有助於顧問理解安裝概念。

words.example_1_en: We need practical implementation guidance, not only theoretical Electromagnetic Compatibility (EMC) advice.
words.example_1_zh: 我們需要實際執行的指導，而不只是理論上的 EMC 建議。
words.example_2_en: The consultant should recommend practical implementation methods for composite structures.
words.example_2_zh: 顧問應建議適用於複合材質結構的實作方式。

words.example_1_en: This slide summarizes the responses to consultant questions.
words.example_1_zh: 這張簡報彙整了對顧問問題的回覆。
words.example_2_en: Each consultant question should be answered with clear supporting information.
words.example_2_zh: 每個顧問問題都應以清楚的佐證資訊回覆。

words.example_1_en: Please refer to the attached file for our responses to your questions.
words.example_1_zh: 請參考附件中我們對您問題的回覆。
words.example_2_en: The response should be concise but technically complete.
words.example_2_zh: 回覆應簡潔但技術內容完整。

words.example_1_en: Please refer to the briefing document for more details.
words.example_1_zh: 更多細節請參考簡報文件。
words.example_2_en: The briefing document summarizes the current grounding concept.
words.example_2_zh: 該簡報文件彙整了目前的接地概念。

words.example_1_en: The attached file includes our responses and supporting explanations.
words.example_1_zh: 附件包含我們的回覆與補充說明。
words.example_2_en: A supporting explanation is provided for the proposed bonding method.
words.example_2_zh: 針對建議的搭接方法已提供補充說明。

words.example_1_en: Please refer to the attached briefing document for more details.
words.example_1_zh: 更多細節請參考附件簡報文件。
words.example_2_en: For more details, please see the grounding layout on the next slide.
words.example_2_zh: 更多細節請見下一頁的接地配置圖。

words.example_1_en: The bonding resistance shall be checked at each interface.
words.example_1_zh: 每個介面的搭接電阻都應被檢查。
words.example_2_en: The interface between the panel and the ring is critical for Electromagnetic Compatibility (EMC).
words.example_2_zh: 面板與航電環之間的介面對 EMC 很關鍵。

words.example_1_en: The structural department has preliminarily agreed to this approach.
words.example_1_zh: 結構部門已初步同意此作法。
words.example_2_en: The acceptance values were preliminarily defined for discussion.
words.example_2_zh: 驗收值是為了討論而初步定義的。

words.example_1_en: The copper foil and busbars will be installed internally.
words.example_1_zh: 銅箔與銅排將安裝在內部。
words.example_2_en: This change should be reviewed internally before sending it to the consultant.
words.example_2_zh: 此變更在送給顧問前應先進行內部審查。

words.example_1_en: The values shown in this table are preliminary assumptions.
words.example_1_zh: 此表中的數值為初步假設。
words.example_2_en: This grounding layout is based on a preliminary assumption.
words.example_2_zh: 此接地配置是基於初步假設。

words.example_1_en: The following are engineering design assumptions.
words.example_1_zh: 以下是工程設計假設。
words.example_2_en: Engineering design assumptions should be clearly separated from final requirements.
words.example_2_zh: 工程設計假設應與最終需求清楚區分。

words.example_1_en: The assumed values shall be confirmed in the final requirements.
words.example_1_zh: 假設值應在最終需求中確認。
words.example_2_en: The final requirement will be defined after consultant review.
words.example_2_zh: 最終需求將在顧問審查後定義。

words.chinese_meaning: 待最終確認；需最終確認
words.example_1_en: The values are preliminary assumptions and subject to final confirmation.
words.example_1_zh: 這些數值為初步假設，仍待最終確認。
words.example_2_en: The bonding method is subject to final confirmation by the structural team.
words.example_2_zh: 搭接方法仍需由結構團隊做最終確認。

words.example_1_en: Copper busbars will be installed on top of the copper foil.
words.example_1_zh: 銅排將安裝在銅箔上方。
words.example_2_en: The bonding washer is placed on top of the conductive surface.
words.example_2_zh: 搭接墊片放置在導電表面上方。

words.example_1_en: Copper busbars will be installed on top of the copper foil.
words.example_1_zh: 銅排將安裝在銅箔上方。
words.example_2_en: The subsystem chassis is bonded to the copper busbar.
words.example_2_zh: 子系統機殼與銅排進行搭接。

words.example_1_en: Copper braided straps will be used to interconnect the panels and the avionics ring.
words.example_1_zh: 銅編織帶將用於互連面板與航電環。
words.example_2_en: A short copper braided strap reduces bonding inductance.
words.example_2_zh: 短的銅編織帶可以降低搭接電感。

words.example_1_en: We have identified aerospace-grade materials for the outer surface.
words.example_1_zh: 我們已找到可用於外表面的航太等級材料。
words.example_2_en: Aerospace-grade coatings are usually qualified for harsh environments.
words.example_2_zh: 航太等級塗層通常會通過嚴苛環境的驗證。

words.example_1_en: The material has ESD protection properties.
words.example_1_zh: 該材料具有 ESD 保護特性。
words.example_2_en: Electrical conductivity is an important material property.
words.example_2_zh: 導電性是一項重要的材料特性。

words.example_1_en: Each subsystem will be bonded to the local copper busbar.
words.example_1_zh: 每個子系統都會搭接到局部銅排。
words.example_2_en: The avionics ring contains multiple power, RF, and control subsystems.
words.example_2_zh: 航電環包含多個電源、射頻與控制子系統。

words.example_1_en: The copper busbars interconnect the composite panels and the avionics ring.
words.example_1_zh: 銅排將複合材料面板與航電環互相連接。
words.example_2_en: All bonding points should be interconnected with low impedance paths.
words.example_2_zh: 所有搭接點應以低阻抗路徑互連。

words.example_1_en: Electromagnetic Compatibility (EMC) problems often appear during system integration.
words.example_1_zh: EMC 問題經常在系統整合階段出現。
words.example_2_en: The grounding condition changes after system integration on a non-conductive ring.
words.example_2_zh: 系統整合到不導電環上後，接地條件會改變。

words.example_1_en: MIL-STD-464 defines requirements for Electromagnetic Environmental Effects at the system level.
words.example_1_zh: MIL-STD-464 定義系統層級電磁環境效應的要求。
words.example_2_en: Lightning, ESD, RF exposure, and intra-system Electromagnetic Compatibility (EMC) are part of Electromagnetic Environmental Effects.
words.example_2_zh: 雷擊、ESD、RF 暴露與系統內 EMC 都屬於電磁環境效應的一部分。
words.category: Electromagnetic Compatibility (EMC) / Electromagnetic Environmental Effects (E3) Planning

words.example_1_en: System-level Electromagnetic Compatibility (EMC) can fail even if each electronic box passes Military Standard 461 (MIL-STD-461).
words.example_1_zh: 即使每個電子盒都通過 MIL-STD-461，系統層級 EMC 仍可能失敗。
words.example_2_en: The consultant should review the system-level Electromagnetic Compatibility (EMC) risk after installation on the avionics ring.
words.example_2_zh: 顧問應審查航電環安裝後的系統層級 EMC 風險。
words.category: Electromagnetic Compatibility (EMC) / Electromagnetic Environmental Effects (E3) Planning

words.example_1_en: The Electromagnetic Environmental Effects (E3) Control Plan should include bonding resistance and shield continuity checks.
words.example_1_zh: E3 控制計畫應包含搭接電阻與屏蔽連續性檢查。
words.example_2_en: Worst-case operation should be captured in the Electromagnetic Environmental Effects (E3) Control Plan.
words.example_2_zh: 最壞情境操作應納入 E3 控制計畫。
words.category: Electromagnetic Compatibility (EMC) / Electromagnetic Environmental Effects (E3) Planning

words.example_1_en: The avionics ring must operate safely in the mission electromagnetic environment.
words.example_1_zh: 航電環必須能在任務電磁環境中安全運作。
words.example_2_en: RF transmitters, ground support equipment, and lightning effects all shape the mission electromagnetic environment.
words.example_2_zh: RF 發射器、地面支援設備與雷擊效應都會形成任務電磁環境。
words.category: Electromagnetic Compatibility (EMC) / Electromagnetic Environmental Effects (E3) Planning

words.chinese_meaning: 系統內 EMC；系統內部相容性
words.example_1_en: Intra-system Electromagnetic Compatibility (EMC) checks whether one onboard subsystem interferes with another.
words.example_1_zh: 系統內 EMC 檢查一個機載子系統是否會干擾另一個子系統。
words.example_2_en: JetVane operation is a key intra-system Electromagnetic Compatibility (EMC) case for DAQ monitoring.
words.example_2_zh: JetVane 動作是 DAQ 監測的重要系統內 EMC 情境。
words.category: Electromagnetic Compatibility (EMC) / Electromagnetic Environmental Effects (E3) Planning

words.example_1_en: External RF EME should be tailored to the launch and test environment.
words.example_1_zh: 外部 RF 電磁環境應依發射與測試環境裁剪。
words.example_2_en: The RF receiver must remain functional under the specified external RF EME.
words.example_2_zh: RF 接收器必須在指定外部 RF 電磁環境下維持功能。
words.category: Electromagnetic Compatibility (EMC) / Electromagnetic Environmental Effects (E3) Planning

words.example_1_en: The impedance requirement should be confirmed before final design release.
words.example_1_zh: 阻抗要求應在最終設計發行前確認。
words.example_2_en: Each bonding interface may have a different impedance requirement.
words.example_2_zh: 每個搭接介面可能有不同的阻抗要求。

words.example_1_en: The acceptance values in the table are preliminary assumptions.
words.example_1_zh: 表格中的驗收值為初步假設。
words.example_2_en: Each acceptance value should be confirmed by test requirements.
words.example_2_zh: 每個驗收值都應由測試需求確認。

words.example_1_en: The control plan links design rules to inspection and test evidence.
words.example_1_zh: 控制計畫將設計規則連結到檢查與測試證據。
words.example_2_en: Bonding checks should be listed in the control plan.
words.example_2_zh: 搭接檢查應列入控制計畫。

words.example_1_en: Each bonding measurement should be stored as an acceptance record.
words.example_1_zh: 每項搭接量測都應保存為驗收紀錄。
words.example_2_en: The consultant may ask for the acceptance record before Electromagnetic Compatibility (EMC) testing.
words.example_2_zh: 顧問可能會在 EMC 測試前要求查看驗收紀錄。

words.example_1_en: A verification record should show the measured value and the acceptance limit.
words.example_1_zh: 驗證紀錄應顯示量測值與允收限制。
words.example_2_en: The verification record supports the final MIL-STD-464 compliance review.
words.example_2_zh: 驗證紀錄支援最終 MIL-STD-464 符合性審查。

words.example_1_en: A source-victim matrix helps identify which subsystem may disturb another subsystem.
words.example_1_zh: 干擾源－受害者矩陣可幫助識別哪個子系統可能干擾另一個子系統。
words.example_2_en: The source-victim matrix should include JetVane, Electronic Power Distribution System (EPDS), RF modules, DAQ, and flight computers.
words.example_2_zh: 干擾源－受害者矩陣應包含 JetVane、EPDS、RF 模組、DAQ 與飛控電腦。

words.example_1_en: The DAQ module is a likely victim of actuator switching noise.
words.example_1_zh: DAQ 模組很可能是致動器切換雜訊的受害者。
words.example_2_en: A victim should be monitored during each worst-case Electromagnetic Compatibility (EMC) test.
words.example_2_zh: 每個最壞情境 EMC 測試都應監測受害設備。

words.example_1_en: A long cable shield can become a coupling path for RF noise.
words.example_1_zh: 長距離線纜屏蔽層可能變成 RF 雜訊的耦合路徑。
words.example_2_en: The review should identify every major coupling path between noisy and sensitive subsystems.
words.example_2_zh: 審查應識別強干擾與敏感子系統之間的主要耦合路徑。

words.example_1_en: A floating enclosure may develop a different potential from nearby equipment.
words.example_1_zh: 浮接機殼可能與附近設備形成不同電位。
words.example_2_en: Floating enclosures can make the Electromagnetic Compatibility (EMC) result sensitive to cable placement.
words.example_2_zh: 浮接機殼會讓 EMC 結果容易受到線束擺放影響。

words.example_1_en: A floating shield may act like a long antenna instead of a shield.
words.example_1_zh: 浮接屏蔽層可能像長天線，而不是屏蔽。
words.example_2_en: The design must prevent the cable shield from becoming a floating shield.
words.example_2_zh: 設計必須避免線纜屏蔽層變成浮接屏蔽層。

words.example_1_en: Parasitic capacitance can couple actuator noise into a nearby sensor line.
words.example_1_zh: 寄生電容可能將致動器雜訊耦合到附近感測器線路。
words.example_2_en: A conductive reference surface helps control parasitic capacitance paths.
words.example_2_zh: 導電參考面有助於控制寄生電容路徑。

words.example_1_en: Common-mode current on a cable can increase radiated emissions.
words.example_1_zh: 線纜上的共模電流可能增加輻射發射。
words.example_2_en: Shield termination and filtering are used to control common-mode current.
words.example_2_zh: 屏蔽終端與濾波可用來控制共模電流。

words.example_1_en: High di/dt loads such as JetVane drivers require careful routing and filtering.
words.example_1_zh: JetVane 驅動器等高 di/dt 負載需要謹慎走線與濾波。
words.example_2_en: The high di/dt current loop should be kept as small as possible.
words.example_2_zh: 高 di/dt 電流迴路應盡可能縮小。

words.example_1_en: High dv/dt switching can capacitively couple noise into sensor wiring.
words.example_1_zh: 高 dv/dt 切換可能透過電容性耦合把雜訊導入感測器配線。
words.example_2_en: A shielded enclosure can reduce the effect of high dv/dt switching nodes.
words.example_2_zh: 屏蔽外殼可降低高 dv/dt 切換節點的影響。

words.example_1_en: Surge protection is required at interfaces exposed to external transients.
words.example_1_zh: 暴露於外部瞬態的介面需要突波保護。
words.example_2_en: TVS devices are commonly used for surge protection on power and signal lines.
words.example_2_zh: TVS 元件常用於電源與訊號線的突波保護。

words.example_1_en: A load step on the 48 V bus can disturb sensitive electronics.
words.example_1_zh: 48 V 匯流排上的負載階躍可能干擾敏感電子設備。
words.example_2_en: The Electronic Power Distribution System (EPDS) transient test should include several load step conditions.
words.example_2_zh: EPDS 瞬態測試應包含多種負載階躍條件。

words.example_1_en: Precipitation static can accumulate on non-conductive surfaces.
words.example_1_zh: 降水靜電可能累積在不導電表面上。
words.example_2_en: The avionics ring needs a controlled discharge path for precipitation static.
words.example_2_zh: 航電環需要為降水靜電提供可控洩放路徑。

words.example_1_en: Lightning indirect effects can induce transient currents in long cables.
words.example_1_zh: 雷擊間接效應可能在長線纜中感應瞬態電流。
words.example_2_en: The bonding network should provide a bypass path for lightning indirect effects.
words.example_2_zh: 搭接網路應為雷擊間接效應提供旁路。

words.example_1_en: A cable-induced transient may enter the avionics box through an external interface.
words.example_1_zh: 線纜感應瞬態可能透過外部介面進入航電盒。
words.example_2_en: Surge protection should be placed near the entry point to limit cable-induced transients.
words.example_2_zh: 突波保護應靠近進入點，以限制線纜感應瞬態。

words.example_1_en: The faying interface must be clean before the resistance measurement.
words.example_1_zh: 進行電阻量測前，貼合介面必須清潔。
words.example_2_en: Paint or adhesive contamination at the faying interface can increase resistance.
words.example_2_zh: 貼合介面的漆或膠污染可能增加電阻。

words.chinese_meaning: 多點縫合式連接；密集搭接點
words.example_1_en: More stitching points reduce the high-frequency impedance of the panel edge.
words.example_1_zh: 更多 stitching 點可降低板邊高頻阻抗。
words.example_2_en: RF-sensitive areas should use a shorter stitching interval.
words.example_2_zh: RF 敏感區應使用較短的 stitching 間距。

words.example_1_en: The edge frame improves continuity around the composite panel.
words.example_1_zh: 邊框可改善複材板周圍的連續性。
words.example_2_en: A 360-degree edge frame is preferred for shield termination.
words.example_2_zh: 屏蔽終端優先採用 360 度邊框。

words.chinese_meaning: 中央集線座；中央搭接匯集點
words.example_1_en: The central hub provides a low-impedance connection between the three panels.
words.example_1_zh: 中央 hub 提供三片板之間的低阻抗連接。
words.example_2_en: Sensitive electronics should not be mounted directly on the central hub.
words.example_2_zh: 敏感電子設備不應直接安裝在中央 hub 上。

words.example_1_en: The reference ring provides a continuous path around the avionics ring.
words.example_1_zh: 參考環在航電環周圍提供連續路徑。
words.example_2_en: Each panel should connect to the reference ring at multiple points.
words.example_2_zh: 每片板都應以多點連接到參考環。

words.example_1_en: Worst-case simultaneous operation should include RF transmit and actuator motion.
words.example_1_zh: 最壞情境同時操作應包含 RF 發射與致動器動作。
words.example_2_en: The system must not lose critical data during worst-case simultaneous operation.
words.example_2_zh: 系統在最壞情境同時操作時不得遺失關鍵資料。

words.example_1_en: The all-on worst case verifies whether all noisy subsystems can operate together.
words.example_1_zh: 全部開啟最壞情境用來驗證所有高雜訊子系統是否能同時運作。
words.example_2_en: All-on worst case testing is useful before formal qualification.
words.example_2_zh: 全部開啟最壞情境測試適合在正式鑑定前執行。

words.example_1_en: Quiet mode establishes the baseline noise level of DAQ and navigation.
words.example_1_zh: Quiet mode 用來建立 DAQ 與導航的基線雜訊。
words.example_2_en: The quiet mode result is compared with actuator and RF operating modes.
words.example_2_zh: Quiet mode 結果會與致動器與 RF 操作模式比較。

words.example_1_en: RF transmit mode should use the maximum expected transmit power.
words.example_1_zh: RF 發射模式應使用預期最大發射功率。
words.example_2_en: DAQ drift and receiver desense are monitored during RF transmit mode.
words.example_2_zh: RF 發射模式期間需監測 DAQ 漂移與接收器 desense。

words.example_1_en: The actuator worst case includes maximum JetVane motion and fast valve switching.
words.example_1_zh: 致動器最壞情境包含 JetVane 最大動作與閥門快速切換。
words.example_2_en: Power transients should be recorded during the actuator worst case.
words.example_2_zh: 致動器最壞情境期間應記錄電源瞬態。

words.example_1_en: Each operation mode should have a defined Electromagnetic Compatibility (EMC) observation item.
words.example_1_zh: 每個操作模式都應有定義好的 EMC 觀察項目。
words.example_2_en: Quiet mode and RF transmit mode are two important operation modes.
words.example_2_zh: Quiet mode 與 RF transmit mode 是兩個重要操作模式。

words.example_1_en: No latched fault should occur after an ESD event.
words.example_1_zh: ESD 事件後不得產生鎖存故障。
words.example_2_en: The event log should record any latched fault during the pre-scan.
words.example_2_zh: 事件紀錄應記錄預掃描期間的任何鎖存故障。

words.example_1_en: The acceptance criteria should define allowable functional degradation.
words.example_1_zh: 驗收標準應定義允許的功能劣化程度。
words.example_2_en: Mission-critical functions should have no functional degradation during Electromagnetic Compatibility (EMC) testing.
words.example_2_zh: 任務關鍵功能在 EMC 測試期間不應有功能劣化。

words.example_1_en: The DAQ noise floor is measured before turning on the actuator.
words.example_1_zh: 啟動致動器前需量測 DAQ 的雜訊底限。
words.example_2_en: An increased noise floor may indicate coupling from a noisy subsystem.
words.example_2_zh: 雜訊底限升高可能代表受到高雜訊子系統耦合。

words.example_1_en: Packet loss must be monitored during RF and actuator tests.
words.example_1_zh: RF 與致動器測試期間必須監測封包遺失。
words.example_2_en: A sudden increase in packet loss may indicate Electromagnetic Compatibility (EMC) susceptibility.
words.example_2_zh: 封包遺失突然增加可能表示 EMC 易受擾。

words.chinese_meaning: 系統發射圖譜；系統發射地圖
words.example_1_en: A system emission map helps locate dominant radiated emission sources.
words.example_1_zh: 系統發射圖譜有助於定位主要輻射發射源。
words.example_2_en: The emission map should be updated after harness routing changes.
words.example_2_zh: 線束路徑變更後應更新發射圖譜。

words.example_1_en: The induced level on a cable may increase when the RF transmitter is active.
words.example_1_zh: RF 發射器啟動時，線纜上的感應位準可能增加。
words.example_2_en: The induced level must stay below the equipment tolerance threshold.
words.example_2_zh: 感應位準必須低於設備容許門檻。

words.chinese_meaning: 接收靈敏度降低；去敏感化
words.example_1_en: The S-band transmitter may cause desense in a nearby UHF receiver.
words.example_1_zh: S-band 發射器可能造成附近 UHF 接收器靈敏度降低。
words.example_2_en: Receiver desense should be checked during maximum RF transmit power.
words.example_2_zh: 在最大 RF 發射功率時應檢查接收器 desense。

words.chinese_meaning: 接收器去敏感化；接收器靈敏度下降
words.example_1_en: Receiver desense can occur when onboard noise enters the antenna path.
words.example_1_zh: 當機上雜訊進入天線路徑時，可能發生接收器靈敏度下降。
words.example_2_en: The RF test should monitor receiver desense and packet loss at the same time.
words.example_2_zh: RF 測試應同時監測接收器 desense 與封包遺失。

words.chinese_meaning: 天線配重地；對應地平面
words.example_1_en: An antenna mounted on a composite surface may need a counterpoise.
words.example_1_zh: 安裝在複材表面的天線可能需要 counterpoise。
words.example_2_en: Without a counterpoise, RF current may return through power or communication cables.
words.example_2_zh: 若沒有 counterpoise，RF 電流可能經由電源或通訊線回流。

words.example_1_en: Antenna port induced level should be checked during RF compatibility testing.
words.example_1_zh: RF 相容性測試時應檢查天線埠感應位準。
words.example_2_en: The receiver may be damaged if the antenna port induced level is too high.
words.example_2_zh: 若天線埠感應位準過高，接收器可能受損。

words.chinese_meaning: RF 發射禁止；發射抑制
words.example_1_en: RF transmit inhibit may be required during sensitive ground operations.
words.example_1_zh: 敏感地面操作期間可能需要 RF 發射禁止。
words.example_2_en: The test procedure should verify the RF transmit inhibit function.
words.example_2_zh: 測試程序應驗證 RF 發射禁止功能。

words.example_1_en: Power level control can reduce RF risk during integration testing.
words.example_1_zh: 功率等級控制可降低整合測試期間的 RF 風險。
words.example_2_en: The RF module should support power level control if desense is observed.
words.example_2_zh: 若觀察到 desense，RF 模組應支援功率等級控制。

words.example_1_en: Flight control and navigation are mission-critical functions.
words.example_1_zh: 飛控與導航是任務關鍵功能。
words.example_2_en: Mission-critical data should be monitored during all Electromagnetic Compatibility (EMC) test scenarios.
words.example_2_zh: 所有 EMC 測試情境都應監測任務關鍵資料。

words.example_1_en: A safety-critical command must not be triggered by RF interference.
words.example_1_zh: 安全關鍵指令不得被 RF 干擾誤觸發。
words.example_2_en: Safety-critical functions require clear pass-fail criteria.
words.example_2_zh: 安全關鍵功能需要明確的通過/失敗判準。

words.example_1_en: The implementation must be shown on the engineering drawing.
words.example_1_zh: 實作方式必須呈現在工程圖面上。
words.example_2_en: Good implementation makes the design easier to verify.
words.example_2_zh: 良好的落實方式會讓設計更容易驗證。

words.chinese_meaning: 需求下展；要求逐層分配
words.example_1_en: Requirement flowdown helps each team understand its design responsibility.
words.example_1_zh: 需求下展可幫助各團隊了解自己的設計責任。
words.example_2_en: The Electromagnetic Compatibility (EMC) requirement must flow down to the avionics ring design.
words.example_2_zh: EMC 要求必須下展到航電環設計。

words.example_1_en: The allocated baseline defines the design-to requirements.
words.example_1_zh: 分配基準定義了設計所需符合的要求。
words.example_2_en: Each subsystem should follow the allocated baseline.
words.example_2_zh: 每個子系統都應遵循分配基準。

words.example_1_en: A mission requirement is usually defined at the highest level.
words.example_1_zh: 任務需求通常在最高層級定義。
words.example_2_en: The mission requirement drives the system-level Electromagnetic Compatibility (EMC) design.
words.example_2_zh: 任務需求會推動系統層級的 EMC 設計。

words.example_1_en: The system requirement must be traceable to the mission objective.
words.example_1_zh: 系統需求必須能追溯到任務目標。
words.example_2_en: A clear system requirement prevents different teams from using different assumptions.
words.example_2_zh: 清楚的系統需求可避免不同團隊使用不同假設。

words.example_1_en: Functional analysis breaks a high-level requirement into detailed functions.
words.example_1_zh: 功能分析會把高層級需求拆成詳細功能。
words.example_2_en: The team used functional analysis to define bonding interfaces.
words.example_2_zh: 團隊使用功能分析來定義接合介面。

words.example_1_en: Every subassembly should have electrical continuity to the next higher assembly.
words.example_1_zh: 每個次組件都應與上一層組件具有電氣連續性。
words.example_2_en: The avionics panel is treated as a subassembly of the ring.
words.example_2_zh: 航電板可視為航電環的一個次組件。

words.example_1_en: The interface constraint defines how the equipment is mounted and connected.
words.example_1_zh: 介面限制定義設備如何安裝與連接。
words.example_2_en: Bonding points should be included as interface constraints.
words.example_2_zh: 接合點應納入介面限制中。

words.example_1_en: The launch vehicle is exposed to a severe electromagnetic environment.
words.example_1_zh: 運載火箭會暴露在嚴苛的電磁環境中。
words.example_2_en: The electromagnetic environment includes onboard and external sources.
words.example_2_zh: 電磁環境包含機載與外部來源。

words.example_1_en: Onboard electronics can generate unintentional RF noise.
words.example_1_zh: 機載電子設備可能產生非預期 RF 雜訊。
words.example_2_en: The onboard power system must not disturb sensitive receivers.
words.example_2_zh: 機載電源系統不應干擾敏感接收器。

words.example_1_en: An external source may couple RF energy into the vehicle harness.
words.example_1_zh: 外部來源可能把 RF 能量耦合進載具線路。
words.example_2_en: Pad RF transmitters are one possible external source.
words.example_2_zh: 發射場 RF 發射機是一種可能的外部來源。

words.example_1_en: The structure must carry fault current until the protection device opens.
words.example_1_zh: 結構必須承載故障電流，直到保護裝置動作斷開。
words.example_2_en: A small contact area may overheat under fault current.
words.example_2_zh: 接觸面積太小可能在故障電流下過熱。

words.example_1_en: A short circuit to the chassis can create a shock hazard.
words.example_1_zh: 短路到機殼可能造成觸電危害。
words.example_2_en: The design should prevent a short circuit from entering the composite structure.
words.example_2_zh: 設計應避免短路電流進入複材結構。

words.example_1_en: A dedicated current return path is preferred for power circuits.
words.example_1_zh: 電源電路最好使用專用的電流回流路徑。
words.example_2_en: Do not rely on the composite panel as the current return path.
words.example_2_zh: 不要依賴複材板作為電流回流路徑。

words.example_1_en: The voltage drop must be controlled in the power return path.
words.example_1_zh: 電源回流路徑中的壓降必須受到控制。
words.example_2_en: Excessive voltage drop may reduce equipment margin.
words.example_2_zh: 過大的壓降可能降低設備裕度。

words.example_1_en: RF bonding requires a low impedance path, not just a low DC resistance.
words.example_1_zh: RF 接合需要低阻抗路徑，而不只是低直流電阻。
words.example_2_en: A wide and short path usually has lower impedance.
words.example_2_zh: 寬且短的路徑通常具有較低阻抗。

words.example_1_en: High-frequency currents require a low inductance return path.
words.example_1_zh: 高頻電流需要低電感回流路徑。
words.example_2_en: A long narrow strap does not provide low inductance.
words.example_2_zh: 又長又窄的帶材無法提供低電感。

words.example_1_en: Inductance increases the impedance at high frequency.
words.example_1_zh: 電感會提高高頻下的阻抗。
words.example_2_en: Reducing loop area helps reduce inductance.
words.example_2_zh: 減少迴路面積有助於降低電感。

words.example_1_en: Capacitance between structures can affect RF impedance.
words.example_1_zh: 結構之間的電容會影響 RF 阻抗。
words.example_2_en: The jumper and nearby metal can form unwanted capacitance.
words.example_2_zh: 跳接線與附近金屬可能形成非預期電容。

words.example_1_en: Reactance changes with frequency.
words.example_1_zh: 電抗會隨頻率改變。
words.example_2_en: Impedance includes resistance and reactance.
words.example_2_zh: 阻抗包含電阻與電抗。

words.example_1_en: DC resistance is easy to measure with a micro-ohmmeter.
words.example_1_zh: 直流電阻可用微歐姆計量測。
words.example_2_en: Low resistance does not always mean good RF performance.
words.example_2_zh: 低電阻不一定代表良好的 RF 性能。

words.example_1_en: A micro-ohmmeter is used to measure very low bonding resistance.
words.example_1_zh: 微歐姆計用於量測很低的接合電阻。
words.example_2_en: Use a four-wire method with the micro-ohmmeter.
words.example_2_zh: 使用微歐姆計時應採用四線式量測。

words.example_1_en: RF impedance is more important than DC resistance for high-frequency bonding.
words.example_1_zh: 對高頻接合而言，RF 阻抗比直流電阻更重要。
words.example_2_en: The reference ring should minimize RF impedance.
words.example_2_zh: 參考環應盡量降低 RF 阻抗。

words.example_1_en: The faying surface must be cleaned before assembly.
words.example_1_zh: 接合面在組裝前必須清潔。
words.example_2_en: Paint on the faying surface will degrade the electrical connection.
words.example_2_zh: 接合面上的油漆會降低電氣連接品質。

words.example_1_en: Both mating surfaces must be free of nonconductive films.
words.example_1_zh: 兩個配合面都必須沒有非導電薄膜。
words.example_2_en: The connector flange and panel mating surface require preparation.
words.example_2_zh: 接頭法蘭與面板配合面需要進行表面準備。

words.example_1_en: Metal-to-metal contact is preferred for RF performance.
words.example_1_zh: 金屬對金屬接觸對 RF 性能較佳。
words.example_2_en: A gasket may be needed when metal-to-metal contact is not reliable.
words.example_2_zh: 當金屬對金屬接觸不可靠時，可能需要墊片。

words.example_1_en: Nonconductive coating must be removed from the bonding area.
words.example_1_zh: 非導電塗層必須從接合區域移除。
words.example_2_en: A thin nonconductive coating can make a good joint electrically poor.
words.example_2_zh: 薄薄的非導電塗層可能讓良好的機械接合變成差的電氣接合。

words.example_1_en: Foreign matter on the contact area can increase resistance.
words.example_1_zh: 接觸區域上的異物會增加電阻。
words.example_2_en: Remove all chips, dust, and foreign matter before assembly.
words.example_2_zh: 組裝前應移除所有切屑、灰塵與異物。

words.chinese_meaning: 孔洞；開口；電磁洩漏開口
words.example_1_en: An unbonded seam can become an RF aperture.
words.example_1_zh: 未良好接合的接縫可能形成 RF 開口。
words.example_2_en: Reducing aperture size improves enclosure performance.
words.example_2_zh: 縮小開口尺寸可改善外殼性能。

words.example_1_en: A threaded fastener should not be the only current path.
words.example_1_zh: 螺紋緊固件不應成為唯一的電流路徑。
words.example_2_en: The threaded fastener mainly provides mechanical preload.
words.example_2_zh: 螺紋緊固件主要提供機械預緊力。

words.example_1_en: Rivets can provide good contact when installed correctly.
words.example_1_zh: 鉚釘若正確安裝，可提供良好接觸。
words.example_2_en: At least three rivets are often recommended for one junction.
words.example_2_zh: 一個接合點通常建議至少使用三個鉚釘。

words.example_1_en: Proper preload keeps the joint stable under vibration.
words.example_1_zh: 適當的預緊力可讓接點在振動下保持穩定。
words.example_2_en: Loss of preload may increase contact resistance.
words.example_2_zh: 預緊力喪失可能增加接觸電阻。

words.example_1_en: The joint must maintain contact in a dynamic environment.
words.example_1_zh: 接點必須在動態環境下維持接觸。
words.example_2_en: Vibration and shock are part of the dynamic environment.
words.example_2_zh: 振動與衝擊是動態環境的一部分。

words.example_1_en: Vibration can loosen a poorly designed connection.
words.example_1_zh: 振動可能使設計不良的連接鬆脫。
words.example_2_en: The strap must survive vibration without cracking.
words.example_2_zh: 該帶材必須能承受振動而不破裂。

words.example_1_en: A jumper may be used when direct contact is impractical.
words.example_1_zh: 當直接接觸不可行時，可使用跳接線。
words.example_2_en: The jumper should be short, wide, and easy to inspect.
words.example_2_zh: 跳接線應該短、寬且容易檢查。

words.example_1_en: A flat strap usually has lower inductance than a round wire.
words.example_1_zh: 扁平帶材通常比圓線有較低電感。
words.example_2_en: Keep the strap as short as possible.
words.example_2_zh: 盡可能縮短帶材長度。

words.example_1_en: The length-to-width ratio of the strap should be kept low.
words.example_1_zh: 帶材的長寬比應盡量低。
words.example_2_en: A high length-to-width ratio increases inductance.
words.example_2_zh: 高長寬比會增加電感。

words.example_1_en: Larger surface area improves current carrying capability.
words.example_1_zh: 較大的表面積可改善載流能力。
words.example_2_en: The design should maximize surface area at RF joints.
words.example_2_zh: 設計應最大化 RF 接點的接觸面積。

words.example_1_en: Surface condition affects contact resistance.
words.example_1_zh: 表面狀態會影響接觸電阻。
words.example_2_en: Roughness and hardness are part of surface condition.
words.example_2_zh: 粗糙度與硬度屬於表面狀態的一部分。

words.example_1_en: Cleanliness is essential for reliable electrical contact.
words.example_1_zh: 清潔度對可靠電氣接觸非常重要。
words.example_2_en: Poor cleanliness can cause unstable measurement results.
words.example_2_zh: 清潔度不佳可能造成量測結果不穩定。

words.chinese_meaning: 表面準備；表面處理前準備
words.example_1_en: Surface preparation must be defined before manufacturing.
words.example_1_zh: 表面準備必須在製造前定義清楚。
words.example_2_en: The drawing should specify the required surface preparation.
words.example_2_zh: 圖面應指定所需的表面準備。

words.example_1_en: Use abrasive material carefully to avoid damaging the base metal.
words.example_1_zh: 使用研磨材料時要小心，避免損傷基材。
words.example_2_en: The abrasive material should be compatible with the surface.
words.example_2_zh: 研磨材料應與表面材料相容。

words.example_1_en: Use an approved solvent to clean the faying surface.
words.example_1_zh: 使用核可的溶劑清潔接合面。
words.example_2_en: The solvent must be compatible with the hardware.
words.example_2_zh: 溶劑必須與硬體材料相容。

words.example_1_en: Apply sealant around the joint to prevent moisture intrusion.
words.example_1_zh: 在接點周圍塗佈密封膠以防止濕氣進入。
words.example_2_en: The sealant must not block the electrical contact area.
words.example_2_zh: 密封膠不得阻隔電氣接觸區域。

words.example_1_en: Plating can improve corrosion resistance and electrical contact.
words.example_1_zh: 電鍍可改善耐蝕性與電氣接觸。
words.example_2_en: The plating material must be selected for galvanic compatibility.
words.example_2_zh: 鍍層材料必須依電偶相容性選擇。

words.example_1_en: Tin plating is often used on copper or steel surfaces.
words.example_1_zh: 鍍錫常用於銅或鋼表面。
words.example_2_en: Tin plating may require special control to prevent whisker growth.
words.example_2_zh: 鍍錫可能需要特殊管制以避免錫鬚生長。

words.example_1_en: Nickel plating can reduce dissimilar-metal corrosion risk.
words.example_1_zh: 鍍鎳可降低異種金屬腐蝕風險。
words.example_2_en: Aluminum may be nickel-plated before mating with stainless steel.
words.example_2_zh: 鋁件與不鏽鋼接合前可進行鍍鎳處理。

words.example_1_en: Chemical conversion coating can protect aluminum while maintaining conductivity.
words.example_1_zh: 化學轉化膜可保護鋁材，同時維持導電能力。
words.example_2_en: The drawing may call out a Class 3 chemical conversion coating.
words.example_2_zh: 圖面可標註 Class 3 化學轉化膜。

words.example_1_en: Passivation improves the corrosion resistance of stainless steel.
words.example_1_zh: 鈍化處理可改善不鏽鋼的耐蝕性。
words.example_2_en: Passivation is not primarily an electrical bonding requirement.
words.example_2_zh: 鈍化處理主要不是電氣接合要求。

words.example_1_en: Anodize is usually nonconductive and must be removed from bonding areas.
words.example_1_zh: 陽極處理通常不導電，必須從接合區域移除。
words.example_2_en: The drawing should mask the contact area before anodize.
words.example_2_zh: 圖面應要求在陽極處理前遮蔽接觸區域。

words.example_1_en: Tin whisker growth can create reliability problems.
words.example_1_zh: 錫鬚生長可能造成可靠度問題。
words.example_2_en: Lead-alloyed tin may be used to reduce tin whisker risk.
words.example_2_zh: 含鉛合金錫可用於降低錫鬚風險。

words.example_1_en: Corrosion control must be considered together with electrical contact.
words.example_1_zh: 腐蝕控制必須與電氣接觸一起考量。
words.example_2_en: Poor corrosion control will degrade the joint over time.
words.example_2_zh: 腐蝕控制不佳會讓接點隨時間劣化。

words.example_1_en: The galvanic series helps compare material compatibility.
words.example_1_zh: 電偶序列可用來比較材料相容性。
words.example_2_en: Materials far apart in the galvanic series need special protection.
words.example_2_zh: 在電偶序列中相距很遠的材料需要特殊防護。

words.example_1_en: Carbon-fiber composites often behave as the cathode in a galvanic couple.
words.example_1_zh: 碳纖複材在電偶對中常表現為陰極。
words.example_2_en: The cathode is usually the more noble material.
words.example_2_zh: 陰極通常是較惰性、較耐蝕的材料。

words.example_1_en: The anode is the material that tends to corrode.
words.example_1_zh: 陽極是較容易腐蝕的材料。
words.example_2_en: Protect the anode when dissimilar metals cannot be avoided.
words.example_2_zh: 當無法避免異種金屬時，應保護陽極材料。

words.example_1_en: Moisture can act as an electrolyte in galvanic corrosion.
words.example_1_zh: 濕氣可在電偶腐蝕中扮演電解質。
words.example_2_en: Preventing electrolyte intrusion helps prevent corrosion.
words.example_2_zh: 防止電解質侵入有助於避免腐蝕。

words.example_1_en: Dissimilar metal contact should be reviewed by materials engineers.
words.example_1_zh: 異種金屬接觸應由材料工程師審查。
words.example_2_en: Use plating or sealing when dissimilar metal contact is unavoidable.
words.example_2_zh: 當無法避免異種金屬接觸時，應使用鍍層或密封處理。

words.example_1_en: Moisture can accelerate corrosion at the joint.
words.example_1_zh: 濕氣會加速接點腐蝕。
words.example_2_en: Seal the joint to keep moisture out.
words.example_2_zh: 密封接點以防止濕氣進入。

words.example_1_en: High current at a fastener can cause local heating and delamination.
words.example_1_zh: 緊固件處的高電流可能造成局部發熱與分層。
words.example_2_en: Composite delamination is a serious structural concern.
words.example_2_zh: 複材分層是嚴重的結構問題。

words.example_1_en: Volume resistivity determines whether a material can dissipate charge.
words.example_1_zh: 體積電阻率決定材料是否能釋放電荷。
words.example_2_en: Nonmetallic tubing may need a volume resistivity limit.
words.example_2_zh: 非金屬管路可能需要體積電阻率限制。

words.example_1_en: Graphite epoxy has much lower conductivity than aluminum.
words.example_1_zh: 石墨環氧材料的導電性遠低於鋁。
words.example_2_en: Additional metal paths can improve overall conductivity.
words.example_2_zh: 額外金屬路徑可改善整體導電性。

words.example_1_en: A conductive gasket can improve seam performance.
words.example_1_zh: 導電墊片可改善接縫性能。
words.example_2_en: The gasket must be compressed within the specified range.
words.example_2_zh: 墊片必須壓縮在規定範圍內。

words.example_1_en: Compression set affects whether a gasket can be reused.
words.example_1_zh: 壓縮永久變形會影響墊片是否可重複使用。
words.example_2_en: Low compression set is important for removable covers.
words.example_2_zh: 低壓縮永久變形對可拆蓋板很重要。

words.example_1_en: The chassis should be connected to the reference plane.
words.example_1_zh: 機殼應連接到參考平面。
words.example_2_en: A powered chassis must have a safe fault-current path.
words.example_2_zh: 有供電的機殼必須具有安全的故障電流路徑。

words.example_1_en: The copper layer acts as a local reference plane.
words.example_1_zh: 銅層可作為局部參考平面。
words.example_2_en: All critical shields should return to the reference plane.
words.example_2_zh: 所有關鍵屏蔽都應回到參考平面。

words.example_1_en: The goal is to make the structure as equipotential as practical.
words.example_1_zh: 目標是讓結構盡可能接近等電位。
words.example_2_en: An equipotential reference reduces unwanted voltage differences.
words.example_2_zh: 等電位參考可減少非預期電位差。

words.example_1_en: The avionics panel can be treated like a small equipment rack.
words.example_1_zh: 航電板可視為小型設備機架。
words.example_2_en: An equipment rack should provide defined mounting and bonding points.
words.example_2_zh: 設備機架應提供明確的安裝與接合點。

words.example_1_en: The mounting bracket must have a defined electrical path.
words.example_1_zh: 安裝支架必須有明確的電氣路徑。
words.example_2_en: Do not rely on a painted mounting bracket for RF return.
words.example_2_zh: 不要依賴有塗裝的安裝支架作為 RF 回流。

words.example_1_en: The mounting surface should be prepared before the connector is installed.
words.example_1_zh: 接頭安裝前，安裝面應先完成表面準備。
words.example_2_en: A painted mounting surface may isolate the chassis.
words.example_2_zh: 有塗裝的安裝面可能會使機殼電氣隔離。

words.chinese_meaning: 火工品；爆炸螺栓等火工裝置
words.example_1_en: Pyrotechnics require special attention to prevent accidental ignition.
words.example_1_zh: 火工品需要特別注意，以避免意外點燃。
words.example_2_en: Wires to pyrotechnics should be carefully shielded and terminated.
words.example_2_zh: 連到火工品的線路應仔細屏蔽並妥善終端處理。

words.example_1_en: High impedance at a joint can cause arc discharge.
words.example_1_zh: 接點高阻抗可能造成電弧放電。
words.example_2_en: Arc discharge near fuel or pyrotechnics is dangerous.
words.example_2_zh: 燃料或火工品附近的電弧放電很危險。

words.example_1_en: Resistance measurement can verify workmanship quality.
words.example_1_zh: 電阻量測可驗證施工品質。
words.example_2_en: Poor workmanship may create an intermittent connection.
words.example_2_zh: 施工品質不良可能造成間歇性連接。

words.example_1_en: Quality records should include bonding resistance measurements.
words.example_1_zh: 品質紀錄應包含接合電阻量測值。
words.example_2_en: The quality record supports final acceptance.
words.example_2_zh: 品質紀錄可支援最終驗收。

words.example_1_en: The engineering drawing must identify each bonded area.
words.example_1_zh: 工程圖面必須標示每個接合區域。
words.example_2_en: Manufacturing follows the notes on the engineering drawing.
words.example_2_zh: 製造單位依照工程圖面上的註記執行。

words.example_1_en: A drawing note should specify cleaning and resistance requirements.
words.example_1_zh: 圖面註記應指定清潔與電阻要求。
words.example_2_en: Use a local drawing note for a special bonding location.
words.example_2_zh: 對特殊接合位置使用局部圖面註記。

words.example_1_en: A general note applies to the entire drawing.
words.example_1_zh: 一般註記適用於整張圖面。
words.example_2_en: The general note can define the default cleaning requirement.
words.example_2_zh: 一般註記可定義預設清潔要求。

words.example_1_en: A local note applies only to a specific location.
words.example_1_zh: 局部註記只適用於特定位置。
words.example_2_en: Use a local note when one joint has a different resistance limit.
words.example_2_zh: 當某個接點有不同電阻限制時，使用局部註記。

words.example_1_en: A flag note can be reused at multiple drawing locations.
words.example_1_zh: 旗標註記可重複用於圖面多個位置。
words.example_2_en: The flag note identifies surfaces that require preparation.
words.example_2_zh: 旗標註記可標示需要表面準備的位置。

words.example_1_en: A verification matrix maps each bonding path to a test method.
words.example_1_zh: 驗證矩陣會將每條接合路徑對應到測試方法。
words.example_2_en: The avionics ring should have its own verification matrix.
words.example_2_zh: 航電環應建立自己的驗證矩陣。

words.example_1_en: The work instruction should describe how to prepare the surface.
words.example_1_zh: 作業指導書應說明如何進行表面準備。
words.example_2_en: Do not leave critical bonding steps only in the presentation.
words.example_2_zh: 不要只把關鍵接合步驟留在簡報中。

words.example_1_en: Each measurement result should be traceable to a specific joint.
words.example_1_zh: 每個量測結果都應可追溯到特定接點。
words.example_2_en: Requirements should be traceable from system level to design drawings.
words.example_2_zh: 要求應可從系統層級追溯到設計圖面。

words.example_1_en: The design should keep enough electrical and thermal margin.
words.example_1_zh: 設計應保留足夠的電氣與熱裕度。
words.example_2_en: A poor bonding path can reduce Electromagnetic Compatibility (EMC) margin.
words.example_2_zh: 不良接合路徑可能降低 EMC 裕度。

words.example_1_en: Corrosion mitigation must be included in the design.
words.example_1_zh: 設計中必須包含腐蝕緩解措施。
words.example_2_en: The copper reference ring is one mitigation for RF coupling.
words.example_2_zh: 銅參考環是降低 RF 耦合的一項措施。

words.example_1_en: The table values are assumptions, not final acceptance limits.
words.example_1_zh: 表格數值是假設，不是最終驗收限制。
words.example_2_en: Every design assumption should be reviewed with the consultant.
words.example_2_zh: 每個設計假設都應與顧問確認。

words.example_1_en: A circumferential reference ring is installed along the inner wall.
words.example_1_zh: 環向參考環安裝在內壁周圍。
words.example_2_en: The circumferential path reduces the return loop area.
words.example_2_zh: 環向路徑可降低回流迴路面積。

words.example_1_en: The metal layer should be continuous around the ring.
words.example_1_zh: 金屬層應沿著環形結構連續一圈。
words.example_2_en: A continuous path is better than several isolated metal strips.
words.example_2_zh: 連續路徑比數段孤立金屬條更好。

words.example_1_en: The A1 ring is open-ended at the top and bottom.
words.example_1_zh: A1 航電環上下兩端是開口的。
words.example_2_en: An open-ended structure cannot be treated as a fully enclosed shield.
words.example_2_zh: 開口結構不能視為完整封閉屏蔽體。

words.example_1_en: The reference ring should provide a low-impedance path.
words.example_1_zh: 參考環應提供低阻抗路徑。
words.example_2_en: A low-impedance connection is essential for RF return current.
words.example_2_zh: 低阻抗連接對 RF 回流電流很重要。

words.example_1_en: Use short and wide conductors to create a low-inductance path.
words.example_1_zh: 使用短而寬的導體建立低電感路徑。
words.example_2_en: A low-inductance path is more important than DC resistance at high frequency.
words.example_2_zh: 在高頻時，低電感路徑比 DC 電阻更重要。

words.example_1_en: The bonding path should avoid unwanted resonance.
words.example_1_zh: 搭接路徑應避免不必要的共振。
words.example_2_en: A long strap may resonate at certain frequencies.
words.example_2_zh: 很長的搭接帶可能在特定頻率產生共振。

words.example_1_en: Each joint should be inspected and measured.
words.example_1_zh: 每個接合點都應檢查與量測。
words.example_2_en: A loose joint can increase resistance and noise.
words.example_2_zh: 鬆動的接合點會增加電阻與雜訊。

words.example_1_en: The equipment case should be connected to the vehicle structure.
words.example_1_zh: 設備外殼應連接到載具結構。
words.example_2_en: In a non-conductive ring, the vehicle structure must be defined carefully.
words.example_2_zh: 在非導電航電環中，必須謹慎定義載具結構參考。

words.example_1_en: Each structural element should be part of the controlled reference network.
words.example_1_zh: 每個結構元件都應納入受控參考網路。
words.example_2_en: An isolated structural element may become a noise source.
words.example_2_zh: 孤立的結構元件可能變成雜訊源。

words.example_1_en: The A1 and A4 reference rings should be interconnected.
words.example_1_zh: A1 與 A4 的參考環應互相連接。
words.example_2_en: Interconnected metal paths reduce potential differences.
words.example_2_zh: 互連的金屬路徑可降低電位差。

words.example_1_en: The bonding network should have uniform low impedance.
words.example_1_zh: 搭接網路應具有均勻的低阻抗。
words.example_2_en: A uniform reference helps reduce unexpected current paths.
words.example_2_zh: 一致的參考面有助於降低非預期電流路徑。

words.chinese_meaning: 專用回流線；專用回流路徑
words.example_1_en: The 28 V supply should use a dedicated return conductor.
words.example_1_zh: 28 V 電源應使用專用回流導體。
words.example_2_en: A dedicated return keeps load current out of the reference ring.
words.example_2_zh: 專用回流可避免負載電流流入參考環。

words.example_1_en: A metal cable tray can serve as the bonding backbone.
words.example_1_zh: 金屬線槽可作為搭接主幹。
words.example_2_en: The backbone should follow the main cable route.
words.example_2_zh: 主幹路徑應沿著主要電纜路徑配置。

words.example_1_en: A metal cable tray can provide a controlled return path.
words.example_1_zh: 金屬電纜托盤可提供受控回流路徑。
words.example_2_en: The cable tray should be connected to both reference rings.
words.example_2_zh: 電纜托盤應連接到兩個參考環。

words.example_1_en: A metal conduit can improve shielding along the cable route.
words.example_1_zh: 金屬導管可改善電纜路徑上的屏蔽效果。
words.example_2_en: The conduit must be electrically connected at both ends.
words.example_2_zh: 導管兩端必須做電氣連接。

words.example_1_en: Multiple parallel paths reduce the impedance between A1 and A4.
words.example_1_zh: 多條並聯路徑可降低 A1 與 A4 之間的阻抗。
words.example_2_en: A single path is less robust than several parallel paths.
words.example_2_zh: 單一路徑不如多條並聯路徑可靠。

words.example_1_en: The shield should terminate to the local chassis.
words.example_1_zh: 屏蔽層應端接到局部機殼。
words.example_2_en: Local chassis bonding reduces cable shield current loops.
words.example_2_zh: 局部機殼搭接可降低電纜屏蔽層電流迴路。

words.example_1_en: Fault protection prevents overheating during a short circuit.
words.example_1_zh: 故障保護可避免短路時過熱。
words.example_2_en: Bonding for fault protection is different from RF bonding.
words.example_2_zh: 故障保護用搭接與 RF 搭接不同。

words.example_1_en: The path should survive the specified overload current.
words.example_1_zh: 該路徑應能承受規定的過載電流。
words.example_2_en: Overload current may heat a narrow conductor quickly.
words.example_2_zh: 過載電流可能快速加熱狹窄導體。

words.example_1_en: The current-carrying capability of the bonding path must be verified.
words.example_1_zh: 必須驗證搭接路徑的載流能力。
words.example_2_en: A wide conductor has better current-carrying capability.
words.example_2_zh: 較寬的導體具有較好的載流能力。

words.example_1_en: The cable and reference path should form a small return loop.
words.example_1_zh: 電纜與參考路徑應形成小的回流迴路。
words.example_2_en: A large return loop can radiate more noise.
words.example_2_zh: 大型回流迴路可能輻射更多雜訊。

words.example_1_en: Reducing loop area lowers magnetic coupling.
words.example_1_zh: 降低迴路面積可減少磁場耦合。
words.example_2_en: Keep the bonding path close to the harness to minimize loop area.
words.example_2_zh: 讓搭接路徑靠近線束，以最小化迴路面積。

words.example_1_en: The shield termination strategy depends on the signal type.
words.example_1_zh: 屏蔽端接策略取決於訊號類型。
words.example_2_en: A clear termination strategy is required before harness design.
words.example_2_zh: 線束設計前需要明確的端接策略。

words.example_1_en: A1 and A4 need a controlled interconnection between reference rings.
words.example_1_zh: A1 與 A4 的參考環之間需要受控互連。
words.example_2_en: Controlled interconnection prevents accidental current paths.
words.example_2_zh: 受控互連可避免非預期電流路徑。

words.example_1_en: Measure the end-to-end resistance from the A1 ring to the A4 ring.
words.example_1_zh: 量測 A1 參考環到 A4 參考環的端到端電阻。
words.example_2_en: End-to-end resistance is different from single-joint resistance.
words.example_2_zh: 端到端電阻不同於單一接合點電阻。

words.example_1_en: DC resistance alone does not prove good RF performance.
words.example_1_zh: 僅有直流電阻無法證明良好的 RF 性能。
words.example_2_en: Use a four-wire meter for low DC resistance measurements.
words.example_2_zh: 使用四線式電表量測低直流電阻。

words.example_1_en: Surface conductivity must be verified on the coated composite panel.
words.example_1_zh: 必須驗證塗層複材板的表面導電性。
words.example_2_en: Poor surface conductivity can create local charge buildup.
words.example_2_zh: 表面導電性不佳會造成局部電荷累積。

words.example_1_en: The conductive coating must not be left floating.
words.example_1_zh: 導電塗層不能處於浮接狀態。
words.example_2_en: Conductive coating can help control static charge on a composite surface.
words.example_2_zh: 導電塗層可協助控制複材表面的靜電荷。

words.example_1_en: A floating conductor can behave like an unintended antenna.
words.example_1_zh: 浮接導體可能像非預期天線一樣作用。
words.example_2_en: Copper pieces on the panel should not become floating conductors.
words.example_2_zh: 板上的銅片不應變成浮接導體。

words.example_1_en: An isolated metal plate may become a re-radiator.
words.example_1_zh: 孤立金屬板可能變成再輻射體。
words.example_2_en: Bonding the panel reduces the chance of re-radiation.
words.example_2_zh: 將板件搭接可降低再輻射的機會。

words.example_1_en: The metallized layer should connect to the reference ring.
words.example_1_zh: 金屬化層應連接到參考環。
words.example_2_en: A metallized layer can improve shielding if it is properly terminated.
words.example_2_zh: 若端接正確，金屬化層可改善屏蔽效果。

words.chinese_meaning: 徑向匯流路徑；徑向母線
words.example_1_en: A radial bus connects the center hub to the reference ring.
words.example_1_zh: 徑向母線將中心集線點連到參考環。
words.example_2_en: Three radial buses can match the 120-degree panel layout.
words.example_2_zh: 三條徑向母線可配合 120 度的板件配置。

words.example_1_en: The chassis reference should be defined before cable routing.
words.example_1_zh: 在電纜佈線前應先定義機殼參考點。
words.example_2_en: A stable chassis reference improves EMI repeatability.
words.example_2_zh: 穩定的機殼參考可改善 EMI 測試重複性。

words.example_1_en: Lightning indirect effects can couple into long cables.
words.example_1_zh: 雷擊間接效應可能耦合到長電纜中。
words.example_2_en: Reference rings help control some lightning indirect effects, but they are not enough alone.
words.example_2_zh: 參考環有助於控制部分雷擊間接效應，但單靠它們並不足夠。

words.example_1_en: The weight model is based on the ring geometry and copper coverage.
words.example_1_zh: 重量模型以環體幾何尺寸與銅箔覆蓋率為基礎。
words.example_2_en: Incorrect geometry will lead to an incorrect weight estimate.
words.example_2_zh: 幾何尺寸錯誤會導致重量估算錯誤。

words.example_1_en: Susceptibility tests evaluate how equipment reacts to external fields.
words.example_1_zh: 敏感度測試評估設備對外部場的反應。
words.example_2_en: Poor shielding increases system susceptibility.
words.example_2_zh: 屏蔽不良會增加系統敏感度。
words.category: Electromagnetic Compatibility (EMC) / Electromagnetic Environmental Effects (E3) Core Terms

words.example_1_en: Our goal is to support MIL-STD-464 compliance.
words.example_1_zh: 我們的目標是支撐 MIL-STD-464 合規。
words.example_2_en: Box-level compliance does not guarantee system-level compliance.
words.example_2_zh: 單機合規不代表系統級一定合規。
words.category: Electromagnetic Compatibility (EMC) / Electromagnetic Environmental Effects (E3) Core Terms

words.example_1_en: Military Standard 461 (MIL-STD-461) and MIL-STD-464 are applicable standards.
words.example_1_zh: Military Standard 461 (MIL-STD-461) 與 MIL-STD-464 是適用標準。
words.example_2_en: Applicable standards should be listed before test planning begins.
words.example_2_zh: 在測試規劃開始前應列出適用標準。

words.example_1_en: Umbilical transients may occur during disconnect.
words.example_1_zh: 臍帶纜線在斷開時可能產生暫態。
words.example_2_en: The avionics power input must tolerate umbilical transients.
words.example_2_zh: 航電電源輸入必須能承受臍帶纜線暫態。

words.example_1_en: Each subsystem enclosure should be bonded to the reference network.
words.example_1_zh: 每個子系統外殼都應搭接到參考網路。
words.example_2_en: A floating enclosure may increase radiated emissions.
words.example_2_zh: 浮接外殼可能增加輻射發射。

words.chinese_meaning: 搭接編織帶；接地編織帶
words.example_1_en: A bonding strap should be short and wide.
words.example_1_zh: 搭接編織帶應該短而寬。
words.example_2_en: Long bonding straps are ineffective at high frequency.
words.example_2_zh: 過長的搭接編織帶在高頻下效果不佳。

words.example_1_en: The avionics ring does not have a conductive chassis.
words.example_1_zh: 航電環沒有導電機殼。
words.example_2_en: Without a conductive chassis, shield termination becomes more difficult.
words.example_2_zh: 沒有導電機殼時，屏蔽端接會變得更困難。

words.example_1_en: The coax shield should be bonded at the antenna interface.
words.example_1_zh: 同軸線屏蔽層應在天線介面搭接。
words.example_2_en: Poor coax shield bonding may cause RF leakage.
words.example_2_zh: 同軸屏蔽搭接不良可能造成 RF 洩漏。

words.example_1_en: The consultant should help define acceptance criteria.
words.example_1_zh: 顧問應協助定義驗收標準。
words.example_2_en: Bonding resistance limits should be part of the acceptance criteria.
words.example_2_zh: 搭接電阻限制應納入驗收標準。

words.example_1_en: Bonding inspection should be performed after installation.
words.example_1_zh: 安裝後應執行搭接檢查。
words.example_2_en: Visual inspection alone is not sufficient for bonding verification.
words.example_2_zh: 僅靠目視檢查不足以驗證搭接。

words.example_1_en: The braided strap is modeled as tinned copper in the weight estimate.
words.example_1_zh: 重量估算中將編織帶視為鍍錫銅。
words.example_2_en: Tinned copper can improve corrosion resistance compared with bare copper.
words.example_2_zh: 相較於裸銅，鍍錫銅可提升耐腐蝕性。

words.example_1_en: Self-compatibility testing checks interference within the vehicle.
words.example_1_zh: 自相容性測試會檢查載具內部干擾。
words.example_2_en: Self-compatibility problems often appear when multiple radios operate together.
words.example_2_zh: 多個無線電同時運作時常會出現自相容性問題。

words.example_1_en: The attached file includes our responses and supporting explanations.
words.example_1_zh: 附件包含我們的回覆與補充說明。
words.example_2_en: A supporting explanation is provided for the proposed bonding method.
words.example_2_zh: 針對建議的搭接方法已提供補充說明。

words.example_1_en: The structural department has preliminarily agreed to this approach.
words.example_1_zh: 結構部門已初步同意此作法。
words.example_2_en: The acceptance values were preliminarily defined for discussion.
words.example_2_zh: 驗收值是為了討論而初步定義的。

words.example_1_en: The values shown in this table are preliminary assumptions.
words.example_1_zh: 此表中的數值為初步假設。
words.example_2_en: This grounding layout is based on a preliminary assumption.
words.example_2_zh: 此接地配置是基於初步假設。

words.example_1_en: Copper braided straps will be used to interconnect the panels and the avionics ring.
words.example_1_zh: 銅編織帶將用於互連面板與航電環。
words.example_2_en: A short copper braided strap reduces bonding inductance.
words.example_2_zh: 短的銅編織帶可以降低搭接電感。

words.example_1_en: The material has ESD protection properties.
words.example_1_zh: 該材料具有 ESD 保護特性。
words.example_2_en: Electrical conductivity is an important material property.
words.example_2_zh: 導電性是一項重要的材料特性。

words.chinese_meaning: 多點縫合式連接；密集搭接點
words.example_1_en: More stitching points reduce the high-frequency impedance of the panel edge.
words.example_1_zh: 更多 stitching 點可降低板邊高頻阻抗。
words.example_2_en: RF-sensitive areas should use a shorter stitching interval.
words.example_2_zh: RF 敏感區應使用較短的 stitching 間距。

words.example_1_en: The acceptance criteria should define allowable functional degradation.
words.example_1_zh: 驗收標準應定義允許的功能劣化程度。
words.example_2_en: Mission-critical functions should have no functional degradation during Electromagnetic Compatibility (EMC) testing.
words.example_2_zh: 任務關鍵功能在 EMC 測試期間不應有功能劣化。

words.chinese_meaning: RF 發射禁止；發射抑制
words.example_1_en: RF transmit inhibit may be required during sensitive ground operations.
words.example_1_zh: 敏感地面操作期間可能需要 RF 發射禁止。
words.example_2_en: The test procedure should verify the RF transmit inhibit function.
words.example_2_zh: 測試程序應驗證 RF 發射禁止功能。

words.example_1_en: Please refer to the briefing document for more details.
words.example_1_zh: 更多細節請參考簡報文件。
words.example_2_en: The briefing document summarizes the current grounding concept.
words.example_2_zh: 該簡報文件彙整了目前的接地概念。

words.example_1_en: Copper busbars will be installed on top of the copper foil.
words.example_1_zh: 銅排將安裝在銅箔上方。
words.example_2_en: The bonding washer is placed on top of the conductive surface.
words.example_2_zh: 搭接墊片放置在導電表面上方。

words.chinese_meaning: 待最終確認；需最終確認
words.example_1_en: The values are preliminary assumptions and subject to final confirmation.
words.example_1_zh: 這些數值為初步假設，仍待最終確認。
words.example_2_en: The bonding method is subject to final confirmation by the structural team.
words.example_2_zh: 搭接方法仍需由結構團隊做最終確認。

words.example_1_en: The final flight article should use the 100 micrometer copper foil baseline.
words.example_1_zh: 最終飛行件應以 100 微米銅箔為基準。
words.example_2_en: Prototype weights may differ from the flight article weight.
words.example_2_zh: 原型件重量可能與飛行件重量不同。

words.example_1_en: The upper ring busbar length is based on the ring circumference.
words.example_1_zh: 上方環形銅排長度依據環體圓周長計算。
words.example_2_en: The circumference is calculated from the ring diameter.
words.example_2_zh: 圓周長由環體直徑計算。

words.example_1_en: Copper foil thickness has a major impact on total weight.
words.example_1_zh: 銅箔厚度對總重量有很大影響。
words.example_2_en: The busbar thickness options are 1 millimeter and 2 millimeters.
words.example_2_zh: 銅排厚度選項為 1 毫米與 2 毫米。

words.example_1_en: The weight estimate includes copper foil, busbars, screws, washers, and braided straps.
words.example_1_zh: 重量估算包含銅箔、銅排、螺絲、墊片與編織帶。
words.example_2_en: This weight estimate does not include adhesive or installation loss.
words.example_2_zh: 此重量估算不包含黏著劑或施工耗損。

words.example_1_en: Adhesive weight is outside the current estimate boundary.
words.example_1_zh: 黏著劑重量不在目前估算邊界內。
words.example_2_en: The adhesive process must prevent copper foil edges from lifting.
words.example_2_zh: 黏著製程必須避免銅箔邊緣翹起。

words.example_1_en: Surface treatment must not insulate the bonding contact area.
words.example_1_zh: 表面處理不可使搭接接觸面變成絕緣。
words.example_2_en: Copper, aluminum, and stainless steel may require different surface treatments.
words.example_2_zh: 銅、鋁與不鏽鋼可能需要不同的表面處理。

words.example_1_en: Edge lifting of copper foil should be avoided during installation.
words.example_1_zh: 施工時應避免銅箔邊緣翹起。
words.example_2_en: Edge lifting can create unreliable electrical contact.
words.example_2_zh: 邊緣翹起可能造成不可靠的電氣接觸。

words.example_1_en: A compliance matrix tracks every Electromagnetic Compatibility (EMC) requirement.
words.example_1_zh: 符合性矩陣追蹤每項 Electromagnetic Compatibility (EMC) 需求。
words.example_2_en: The compliance matrix should identify verification status and evidence.
words.example_2_zh: 符合性矩陣應標示驗證狀態與證據。

words.example_1_en: Wire segregation prevents noisy cables from coupling into sensitive signals.
words.example_1_zh: 線路隔離可避免噪聲線纜耦合到敏感訊號。
words.example_2_en: Power, RF, and low-level analog wires need proper wire segregation.
words.example_2_zh: 電源、RF 與低位準類比線路需要適當線路隔離。

words.example_1_en: The structure may not provide a sufficient Radio Frequency (RF) reference.
words.example_1_zh: 此結構可能無法提供足夠的 RF 參考。
words.example_2_en: We need sufficient bonding points around the avionics ring.
words.example_2_zh: 我們需要在航電環周圍提供足夠的搭接點。

words.example_1_en: The A1 avionics ring is approximately 110 cm in diameter.
words.example_1_zh: A1 航電環直徑約 110 公分。
words.example_2_en: Each composite panel is approximately 50 cm by 40 cm.
words.example_2_zh: 每片複合板尺寸約為 50 公分乘 40 公分。

words.example_1_en: Although each subsystem passed Military Standard 461 (MIL-STD-461), system-level integration still needs to be verified.
words.example_1_zh: 雖然每個子系統都通過 MIL-STD-461，系統級整合仍然需要驗證。
words.example_2_en: Although the ring is lightweight, it does not provide a natural conductive reference.
words.example_2_zh: 雖然航電環很輕，但它不會提供天然的導電參考。

words.example_1_en: Shielding effectiveness depends on continuity and proper termination.
words.example_1_zh: 屏蔽有效性取決於連續性與適當的端接。
words.example_2_en: We need to verify the effectiveness of the bonding network.
words.example_2_zh: 我們需要驗證搭接網路的有效性。

words.chinese_meaning: 對……反應；回應（注意：不是「導致」，導致可用 lead to / result in）
words.example_1_en: We need to understand how the system will react to external Radio Frequency (RF) fields.
words.example_1_zh: 我們需要了解系統會如何對外部 RF 場反應。
words.example_2_en: The Data Acquisition (DAQ) system may react to conducted noise on the power line.
words.example_2_zh: DAQ 系統可能會對電源線上的傳導雜訊產生反應。

words.example_1_en: A long pigtail may make the cable shield ineffective at high frequency.
words.example_1_zh: 過長的豬尾線可能使線纜屏蔽在高頻下失效。
words.example_2_en: Shielding can be ineffective without a proper termination reference.
words.example_2_zh: 若沒有適當的端接參考，屏蔽可能無效。

words.example_1_en: Our main concern is the lack of a conductive reference structure.
words.example_1_zh: 我們主要的疑慮是缺少導電參考結構。
words.example_2_en: The consultant should understand our system-level Electromagnetic Compatibility (EMC) concerns.
words.example_2_zh: 顧問應了解我們的系統級 EMC 疑慮。

words.example_1_en: The lack of a conductive chassis is the main system-level concern.
words.example_1_zh: 缺乏導電機殼是主要的系統級疑慮。
words.example_2_en: A lack of shield continuity can reduce Electromagnetic Compatibility (EMC) performance.
words.example_2_zh: 缺乏屏蔽連續性會降低 EMC 性能。

words.example_1_en: Countdown constraints may prevent certain RF transmitters from operating.
words.example_1_zh: 倒數限制可能禁止某些 RF 發射機運作。
words.example_2_en: Each constraint should be linked to a safety or Electromagnetic Compatibility (EMC) requirement.
words.example_2_zh: 每項限制條件都應連結到安全或 Electromagnetic Compatibility (EMC) 需求。

words.example_1_en: The proposed topics are intended for the consultant's presentation.
words.example_1_zh: 這些建議議題是提供給顧問簡報使用的。
words.example_2_en: We need to review the proposed grounding concept before implementation.
words.example_2_zh: 在實作前，我們需要審查建議的接地概念。

words.chinese_meaning: 有目的的；被設計為某用途的（較少用；名詞建議用 purpose）
words.example_1_en: The proposed bonding network is purposed to provide a low-impedance reference path.
words.example_1_zh: 所提出的搭接網路旨在提供低阻抗參考路徑。
words.example_2_en: In most technical writing, use 'intended' or 'designed' instead of 'purposed'.
words.example_2_zh: 在多數技術寫作中，建議用 intended 或 designed 取代 purposed。

words.example_1_en: The diagram shows the bonding connection between the panels and the avionics ring.
words.example_1_zh: 示意圖顯示複合板與航電環之間的搭接連接。
words.example_2_en: A clear diagram will help the consultant understand the installation concept.
words.example_2_zh: 清楚的示意圖有助於顧問理解安裝概念。

words.example_1_en: We would appreciate your experience in rocket integration testing.
words.example_1_zh: 我們很希望了解您在火箭整合測試方面的經驗。
words.example_2_en: Practical experience is important for grounding and shielding implementation.
words.example_2_zh: 實務經驗對接地與屏蔽實作非常重要。

words.chinese_meaning: 賓士星形結構；三叉星形配置
words.example_1_en: The A1 mounting panels are arranged in a Mercedes-star configuration.
words.example_1_zh: A1 安裝板以賓士星形配置排列。
words.example_2_en: The Mercedes-star layout provides three vertical mounting surfaces inside the ring.
words.example_2_zh: 賓士星形配置在航電環內提供三個垂直安裝面。

words.example_1_en: The three composite panels are arranged at 120 degrees.
words.example_1_zh: 三片複合板以 120 度排列。
words.example_2_en: The bonding points should be arranged at regular intervals around the ring.
words.example_2_zh: 搭接點應沿航電環以固定間距排列。

words.example_1_en: Proper shield termination is required for high-frequency Electromagnetic Compatibility (EMC) control.
words.example_1_zh: 高頻 EMC 控制需要適當的屏蔽端接。
words.example_2_en: A proper bonding path should be short and low impedance.
words.example_2_zh: 適當的搭接路徑應該短且低阻抗。

words.example_1_en: The key challenge is the non-conductive composite structure.
words.example_1_zh: 主要挑戰是不導電的複合材質結構。
words.example_2_en: Cable shield termination is a major challenge in this design.
words.example_2_zh: 線纜屏蔽端接是此設計中的主要挑戰。

words.example_1_en: Please keep the briefing document concise and focused.
words.example_1_zh: 請讓簡報文件保持簡潔且聚焦。
words.example_2_en: A concise summary helps the consultant understand the main issue quickly.
words.example_2_zh: 簡潔的摘要有助於顧問快速了解主要問題。

words.example_1_en: We would like to consult with you regarding the grounding architecture.
words.example_1_zh: 我們想就接地架構向您請教。
words.example_2_en: The attached file includes discussion topics regarding MIL-STD-464 compliance.
words.example_2_zh: 附件包含有關 MIL-STD-464 合規性的討論議題。

words.chinese_meaning: 系統內 EMC；系統內部相容性
words.example_1_en: Intra-system Electromagnetic Compatibility (EMC) checks whether one onboard subsystem interferes with another.
words.example_1_zh: 系統內 EMC 檢查一個機載子系統是否會干擾另一個子系統。
words.example_2_en: JetVane operation is a key intra-system Electromagnetic Compatibility (EMC) case for DAQ monitoring.
words.example_2_zh: JetVane 動作是 DAQ 監測的重要系統內 EMC 情境。
words.category: Electromagnetic Compatibility (EMC) / Electromagnetic Environmental Effects (E3) Planning

words.example_1_en: The design scope is limited to conductive materials and standard fasteners.
words.example_1_zh: 設計範圍限於導電材料與標準固定件。
words.example_2_en: Adhesive and protective film are outside the current design scope.
words.example_2_zh: 黏著劑與保護膜不在目前設計範圍內。

words.example_1_en: The A4 baseline uses 100 micrometer copper foil and a 1 millimeter busbar.
words.example_1_zh: A4 基準配置使用 100 微米銅箔與 1 毫米銅排。
words.example_2_en: A clear baseline helps compare weight changes between options.
words.example_2_zh: 明確的基準有助於比較各方案的重量變化。

words.example_1_en: The upper-only busbar option is a trade-off between weight and Electromagnetic Compatibility (EMC) risk.
words.example_1_zh: 僅上方銅排方案是重量與 EMC 風險之間的折衷。
words.example_2_en: Every trade-off should be reviewed with the consultant before design freeze.
words.example_2_zh: 每個折衷方案都應在設計凍結前與顧問確認。

words.example_1_en: The final flight article should use the 100 micrometer copper foil baseline.
words.example_1_zh: 最終飛行件應以 100 微米銅箔為基準。
words.example_2_en: Prototype weights may differ from the flight article weight.
words.example_2_zh: 原型件重量可能與飛行件重量不同。

words.example_1_en: Copper foil is attached to the inner wall of the avionics ring.
words.example_1_zh: 銅箔貼附在航電環內壁。
words.example_2_en: The A4 inner wall has a larger foil area than the A1 inner wall.
words.example_2_zh: A4 內壁的銅箔面積比 A1 內壁大。

words.example_1_en: The weight model is based on the ring geometry and copper coverage.
words.example_1_zh: 重量模型以環體幾何尺寸與銅箔覆蓋率為基礎。
words.example_2_en: Incorrect geometry will lead to an incorrect weight estimate.
words.example_2_zh: 幾何尺寸錯誤會導致重量估算錯誤。

words.example_1_en: The upper ring busbar length is based on the ring circumference.
words.example_1_zh: 上方環形銅排長度依據環體圓周長計算。
words.example_2_en: The circumference is calculated from the ring diameter.
words.example_2_zh: 圓周長由環體直徑計算。

words.example_1_en: The coverage ratio of the A1 inner-wall copper foil is about 80 percent.
words.example_1_zh: A1 內壁銅箔覆蓋率約為 80%。
words.example_2_en: Changing the coverage ratio directly changes the copper foil weight.
words.example_2_zh: 改變覆蓋率會直接改變銅箔重量。

words.example_1_en: The top busbar connects each subsystem to the reference ring.
words.example_1_zh: 上方銅排將各子系統連接到參考環。
words.example_2_en: A thicker busbar increases weight but can reduce resistance.
words.example_2_zh: 較厚的銅排會增加重量，但可以降低電阻。

words.example_1_en: Each subsystem is connected to the busbar through a braided strap.
words.example_1_zh: 每個子系統透過編織帶連接至銅排。
words.example_2_en: A shorter braided strap usually gives lower inductance and better RF performance.
words.example_2_zh: 較短的編織帶通常有較低電感與較好的 RF 表現。

words.example_1_en: The braided strap is modeled as tinned copper in the weight estimate.
words.example_1_zh: 重量估算中將編織帶視為鍍錫銅。
words.example_2_en: Tinned copper can improve corrosion resistance compared with bare copper.
words.example_2_zh: 相較於裸銅，鍍錫銅可提升耐腐蝕性。

words.example_1_en: The braided strap weight is estimated using a solid copper equivalent.
words.example_1_zh: 編織帶重量使用銅實心等效方式估算。
words.example_2_en: The actual braided strap may be lighter because of gaps in the weave.
words.example_2_zh: 實際編織帶可能因編織空隙而較輕。

words.example_1_en: Copper density is used to convert volume into weight.
words.example_1_zh: 銅密度用來將體積換算成重量。
words.example_2_en: The report uses stainless-steel density for the screw and washer calculation.
words.example_2_zh: 報告使用不鏽鋼密度來計算螺絲與墊片重量。
